cadence.heading: Cadence
cadence.tooltip: Controls how quickly clicks are generated. In Rate mode, set clicks per second/minute/hour/day. In Delay mode, set the exact time between clicks.
cadence.hotkeyTooltip: Choose the key combo that starts and stops the clicker. Works even when the app is minimized.
cadence.inputTooltip: Select which mouse button gets clicked.
cadence.keyTooltip: Select which keyboard key gets pressed.

doubleClick.heading: Double Click
doubleClick.tooltip: Clicks twice per cycle to simulate a double click.
doubleClick.unavailable: Double Click is unavailable at {{cps}} clicks/sec. Lower the effective click rate below 50 clicks/sec to turn it on.

dutyCycle.heading: Click Duration
dutyCycle.tooltip: Choose how long the mouse button gets held down each click, as a percentage of the click interval.
dutyCycle.label: Click Duration

speedVariation.heading: Speed Variation
speedVariation.tooltip: Randomizes click speed by given percentage.
speedVariation.label: Speed Variation
speedVariation.disabledReason: Enable Speed Variation to edit how much the app randomizes your click timing.

limits.heading: Limits
limits.clickTooltip: Stops automatically after the selected number of clicks.
limits.timeTooltip: Stops automatically after the selected duration.
limits.clickDisabledReason: Enable Click Limit to stop automatically after a set number of clicks.
limits.timeDisabledReason: Enable Time Limit to stop automatically after a set amount of time.

sequence.heading: Sequence Clicking
sequence.tooltip: Cycles through saved cursor positions, clicking at each one in order.
